API Reference¶

This page contains the auto-generated API reference for the rapidtools package.

Core Objects¶

class rapidtools.core.BoundingBox(lon1: float, lat1: float, lon2: float, lat2: float)[source]¶

Represents an axis-aligned rectangular region.

This class provides a convenient initializer for simple boxes and adds specialized behavior, such as tiling.

get_bounding_box() → Self[source]¶

A BoundingBox’s bounding box is itself.

property height: float¶

The height of the bounding box in degrees.

tile_by_area(max_area: float = 0.01) → list[Self][source]¶

A custom method to split this BoundingBox into a grid of smaller BoundingBox objects, each with an area less than or equal to max_area.

property width: float¶

The width of the bounding box in degrees.

class rapidtools.core.Polygon(vertices: list[list[float, float]])[source]¶

Represents a geographical region defined by a list of vertices.

get_bounding_box() → BoundingBox[source]¶

Calculates the smallest bounding box that encloses the polygon.

Returns:

A new BoundingBox object representing the calculated bounds.

Return type:

BoundingBox
